name: 三重射击
effect: 你的【所选技能】技能会瞄准你前方2个额外的敌人。
effect_en: Your chosen ability targets 2 additional enemies in front of you.

name: 不祥契约
effect: 你的技能现在需要消耗5%当前生命值才能施放。作为回报，基于已损失生命值获得法术强度(70%损失时最高75-150)、0-50移动速度和最高15%全能吸血。
effect_en: Your abilities now have a health cost of 5% current health to cast them. In return, you gain ability power based on your missing health, up to 75 to 150 at 70% missing health, 0 to 50 bonus movement speed, and up to 15% omnivamp.

name: 亮出你的剑
effect: 变为近战状态，攻击距离改为200。此外获得30%额外攻击力、25%额外攻击速度、30%额外生命值、25%额外移动速度和20%生命偷取。这些加成基于舍弃的攻击距离进一步提升。
effect_en: Become melee, modifying your attack range to 200 units. Additionally, gain 30% bonus attack damage, 25% bonus attack speed, 30% bonus health, 25% bonus movement speed, and 20% lifesteal. These bonuses scale with the range you give up.

name: 任务：沃格勒特的巫师帽
effect: 立刻获得一个无用大棒。任务：持有灭世者的死亡之帽和中娅沙漏。奖励：获得沃格勒特的巫师帽。
effect_en: Gain a Needlessly Large Rod. Quest: Obtain Rabadon's Deathcap and Zhonya's Hourglass. Reward: Upon completing your Quest:, convert the items you obtained for the quest into Wooglet's Witchcap.

name: 任务：海牛阿福的勇士
effect: 任务：参与击杀18次。奖励：完成需求后获得金铲铲。
effect_en: Quest: Score 18 champion takedowns. Reward: Upon completing your Quest, you receive The Golden Spatula.

name: 信念者的强化
effect: 为友军提供治疗或护盾会赐福他们8秒。被赐福的友军对敌方英雄造成伤害时，你获得1层虔诚(最高50层)。满层时释放一道冲击波造成魔法伤害并处决低生命值敌人。
effect_en: Granting a heal or shield to an allied champion blesses them for 8 seconds. Whenever a blessed ally damages an enemy champion, you generate a stack of Devotion, stacking up to 50 times. Upon reaching 50 stacks, unleash a shockwave dealing magic damage and executing low health enemies.

name: 全凭身法
effect: 你的冲刺、跳跃、闪烁或传送类技能获得175技能急速。
effect_en: Your dash, leap, blink, or teleport Abilities gain 175 Ability Haste.

name: 全能龙魂
effect: 获得3个随机龙魂。
effect_en: Gain 3 random Dragon Souls.

name: 利刃华尔兹
effect: 获得利刃华尔兹作为一个召唤师技能。
effect_en: Gain Blade Waltz as a Summoner Spell.
notes: Tier 已从 gold 修正为 prismatic（来源: LoL Wiki Module）

tests.t: 攻速流ADC核心增强，收益稳定

name: 升级：花晓之剑
effect: 获得100%攻击速度。你对英雄的攻击会使来自【花晓之剑】的治疗效果提升250%。
effect_en: Gain 100% Attack Speed. Increase Sword of Blossoming Dawn's healing to 250% when you attack enemy champions.

name: 双刀流
effect: 在攻击时，发射一个箭矢，它施加效能削减的攻击特效。获得10%总攻击速度。
effect_en: Attacks fire a bolt that applies  On-Hit effects at reduced strength. Gain 10% total Attack Speed.

name: 史上最大雪球
effect: 你的雪球获得100技能急速。你的雪球现在变得非常大，并且可以穿过小兵。它会减速， 击飞英雄，并造成额外伤害。如果你没有雪球，则获得一个雪球。
effect_en: Gain 100 Ability Haste on Snowball. Your snowball is BIG and will pass through minions. It Slows, Knocks Up champions, and deals additional damage.

name: 吃过路兵
effect: 周期性地识别出敌方英雄身上的破绽。 用攻击或技能命中它们时，会造成最大生命值真实伤害、回复生命值并提供移动速度。这些效果可以叠加。
effect_en: Periodically identify Vitals on enemy champions. Hitting them with Attacks or Abilities deals max Health true damage, restores Health, and grants Movement Speed. These effects can stack.

name: 和我一起困在这里
effect: 施放终极技能时创造一个500范围的领域持续2秒，期间你获得40%伤害减免。结束后嘲讽领域内的所有敌人。
effect_en: Casting your ultimate ability creates an aura with a radius of 500 units around you for 2 seconds, during which you also gain 40% damage reduction. After the duration, you taunt all enemies within the area.

name: 咒语裂变
effect: 在命中时、最大距离时或再次施放时，你的【所选技能】技能的飞弹会分裂为两部分。
effect_en: Your chosen ability missile splits into two on hit, at max Range, or when Recast.

name: 回响施放
effect: 施放你的【所选技能】技能时会朝你的鼠标位置派出一个复制体并再次施放该技能。
effect_en: Casting your chosen ability sends a clone toward your mouse position and recasts it.

name: 回归基本功
effect: 你的技能造成35%额外伤害，获得70技能急速，所有来源的治疗和护盾效果提升35%，但你的终极技能被永久封印。
effect_en: Your champion abilities deal 35% increased damage and you gain 70 ability haste and 35% increased healing and shielding from all sources, but your ultimate ability is permanently sealed.

name: 地狱三头犬
effect: 获得丛刃和强攻基石符文。
effect_en: Gain the Hail of Blades and Press the Attack keystone runes.

name: 多重射击
effect: 任务：用【所选技能】技能命中敌方英雄8次。奖励：发射数量基于任务等级的额外飞弹。
effect_en: QUEST: Hit enemy Champions with your chosen ability the required number of times.REWARD: Fire additional missiles per Quest Level.

name: 大地苏醒
effect: 你的冲刺、闪烁或传送类技能会留下一条在0.75秒后爆炸的轨迹。
effect_en: Your dash, blink, or teleport Abilities leave behind a trail that detonates after 0.75 second.
removed_reason: 不在 arammayhem.com 26.12 版本列表中

name: 夺金
effect: 对敌方英雄的攻击或技能造成50-150(+40%额外AD)(+20%AP)额外魔法伤害，并获得30金币和25%额外移动速度，持续1.5秒(30秒冷却)。
effect_en: Damaging basic attacks or abilities against enemy champions deal 50 to 150 (+40% bonus AD) (+20% AP) bonus magic damage, and grant you 30 gold and 25% bonus movement speed for 1.5 seconds (30 second cooldown).

name: 尊我为王
effect: 首次进入敌方传送门或弹射器时加冕为王，获得1个随机棱彩阶强化符文，且你的第一件传说级装备升级。
effect_en: Upon entering the enemy gate or Catapult for the first time, you become Kinged, gaining one random Prismatic augment and upgrading your first legendary item.

name: 尤里卡
effect: 获得相当于30%法术强度的技能急速。
effect_en: Gain Ability Haste equal to 30% Ability Power.

name: 属性叠属性叠属性！
effect: 获得4个【属性锻造器】，有更高几率出现黄金阶和棱彩阶锻造器！在你的下一次强化符文选取时，每个栏位获得一次额外的刷新。
effect_en: Gain 4 Stat Anvils, with a higher chance of Gold and Prismatic Anvils! On your next Augment selection, gain one additional reroll per slot.

name: 巨人杀手
effect: 体型缩小75%，获得30%额外移动速度。对体型大于你的敌方英雄造成10/15/25/30额外伤害。
effect_en: Become tiny, reducing your size by 75% and gaining 30% bonus movement speed. Additionally, deal 10/15/25/30 bonus damage against enemy champions with greater size than you.

name: 巨像的勇气
effect: 定身或缚地一个敌方英雄后获得100-300(基于等级)(+5%最大生命值)护盾值。5秒冷却。
effect_en: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants a shield for 3 seconds that absorbs 100 to 300 (+ 5% maximum health) damage (5 second cooldown per cast instance). Shields can stack between multiple triggers of this effect, though not refreshing the duration of previous shields.

name: 快步
effect: 当你使用【所选技能】技能时，朝你的鼠标指针进行冲刺。
effect_en: When you use your chosen ability, dash towards your cursor.

name: 战争交响乐
effect: 获得致命节奏和征服者基石符文。
effect_en: Gain the Lethal Tempo and Conqueror Keystone Runes.

name: 扳机炼狱
effect: 对不同敌方英雄的攻击或技能获得风格层数，持续6秒可无限叠加。达到S评价时自动使用炼狱扳机。
effect_en: Gain Daredevil Impulse. When you reach S Style, automatically use Inferno Trigger.

name: 掷骰狂人
effect: 附近敌人在阵亡时有几率掉落【属性锻造器】。
effect_en: Nearby enemies have a chance to drop Stat Anvils on death.

name: 无限循环往复
effect: 获得60技能急速，外加每次参与击杀3技能急速。
effect_en: Gain 60 Ability Haste, plus 3 Ability Haste per takedown.

name: 最万用的瞄准镜
effect: 获得300攻击距离，如果你是远程英雄则降低至150攻击距离。
effect_en: Gain 250/150 bonus attack range.

name: 最终形态
effect: 在施放你的终极技能时，获得持续10秒的最大生命值护盾、全能吸血和移动速度。
effect_en: After casting your Ultimate, gain a max Health Shield, Omnivamp and Movement Speed for 10 seconds.

name: 歌利亚巨人
effect: 体型变大，获得35%生命值和15%适应之力。
effect_en: Become large, gaining 35% Health and 15% Adaptive Force.

name: 死亡之环
effect: 你的治疗和生命回复会对1000范围内最近的敌方英雄造成该数值70%的魔法伤害。
effect_en: Healing and health regeneration you do causes you to deal 70% of that value in magic damage to the nearest enemy champion within 1000 units.

name: 残忍
effect: 定身或缚地一个敌方英雄时召唤一颗彗星，1秒后着陆，对附近敌人造成50-150(+40%AP)(+4%最大生命值)魔法伤害。
effect_en: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion summons a comet above them that lands after 1 second, dealing 50 to 150 (+40% AP) (+4% max health) magic damage to nearby enemies.

name: 泰坦的坚决
effect: 在承受或造成伤害时获得层数。每10层，获得适应之力、护甲、魔法抗性、体型和韧性。
effect_en: Gain stacks when taking or dealing damage. For every 10 stacks, gain Adaptive Force, Armor, Magic Resist, Size, and Tenacity.

name: 潘朵拉的盒子
effect: 将你的所有强化符文变为随机的棱彩阶强化符文。
effect_en: Transmute all of your augments into random Prismatic Augments.

name: 濒死悟道
effect: 用攻击或技能伤害敌方英雄时会提供层数。在满层时，你在阵亡时会进行强化复活。
effect_en: Damaging enemy champions with Attacks or Abilities grants stacks. At max stacks, you revive empowered upon death.

name: 灵魄炸弹
effect: 为友方英雄提供治疗和护盾时会为你积攒一颗【灵魄炸弹】。在满层时，投掷该炸弹至生命值最低的那个友军，从而对其和附近友军们提供治疗和护盾。
effect_en: Healing and Shielding allied champions builds up a Spirit Bomb. At max stacks, toss the bomb onto lowest Health ally to heal and shield them and nearby allies.

name: 炼狱导管
effect: 你的技能命中英雄时施加持续5秒的灼烧，每秒造成1.2-12(+2.8%额外AD)(+1.2%AP)魔法伤害(每个施法实例1秒冷却)。灼烧效果可叠加，并且你的灼烧会降低你的基础技能冷却时间。
effect_en: Your ability hits against champions apply a Burn for 5 seconds that deals 1.2 to 12 (+2.8% bonus AD) (+1.2% AP) bonus magic damage per second. Your Burn effects reduce your basic ability cooldowns.

name: 物法皆修
effect: 攻击特效提供6-18法术强度，造成伤害的技能每次施法提供3-9攻击力，持续5秒可叠加。
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit grant 6 to 18 ability power and damaging abilities grant 3 to 9 bonus attack damage, lasting for 5 seconds, stacking.

name: 玻璃大炮
effect: 减少30%最大生命值。造成额外的15%真实伤害。
effect_en: Reduce max Health by 30%. Deal an extra 15% damage as true damage.

name: 珠光护手
effect: 你的技能可以造成暴击，造成145%总伤害。获得25%(+4.5%每100AP)暴击几率。
effect_en: Your abilities can now critically strike for (145% + bonus critical damage) damage. Additionally, gain 25% (+ 4.5% per 100 AP) critical strike chance. If both Jeweled Gauntlet and Vulnerability are equipped, only rolls the critical strike chance of the augment that has the higher critical damage (or either if equal).

name: 男爵之手
effect: 获得25%适应之力。附近友方小兵都获得极大增强。
effect_en: Gain 25% Adaptive Force. Nearby allied minions are greatly empowered.

name: 神圣雪球
effect: 雪球获得100技能急速。你在用【雪球】冲刺后短暂免疫伤害。如果你没有雪球，获得一个雪球。
effect_en: Gain 100 Ability Haste on Snowball. You are briefly Invulnerable when you dash with Snowball.

name: 科学狂人
effect: 获得此强化和每次重生时，要么变大(获得30%适应之力、20%额外生命值和40%体型增大)，要么变小(获得70技能急速、40%额外移动速度和40%体型缩小)。
effect_en: Upon acquiring this augment and each time you respawn, gain either 30% adaptive force, 20% bonus health, and 40% increased size or 70 ability haste, 40% bonus movement speed, and 40% reduced size.

name: 秘术冲拳
effect: 攻击特效使你的各个技能的冷却时间缩减1.25秒。
effect_en: On-Hit reduce the cooldown of your abilities by 1.25 seconds .

name: 空投熊
effect: 阵亡时，一个具有你所有强化符文的巨大提伯斯从天而降并伤害附近的敌人们。
effect_en: On death, a giant Tibbers with all your augments falls from the sky and damages nearby enemies.

name: 精怪魔法
effect: 用终极技能伤害敌人会将其变形为无害的小动物2秒，期间基础移动速度降低60并被缴械(15秒冷却)。
effect_en: Damaging enemies with your ultimate ability polymorphs them into harmless critters for 2 seconds, during which their base movement speed is reduced by 60 and disarms them (15 second cooldown).

name: 终极刷新
effect: 在施放终极技能后刷新你的终极技能(75秒冷却时间或阵亡时重置)。
effect_en: Refresh your Ultimate after casting it (75 seconds Cooldown or reset on death).

name: 终极唤醒
effect: 获得30终极技能急速。在施放你的终极技能后，刷新你的所有基础技能并获得持续15秒的300基础技能急速。(20秒冷却时间)
effect_en: Gain 30 Ultimate Ability Haste. After using your Ultimate, refresh your basic abilities and gain 300 basic ability haste for 15s. (20s Cooldown)

name: 至高天诺言
effect: 获得15%治疗和护盾强度，获得至高天诺言召唤师技能。警惕传送至你的友军并在着陆时提供持续3秒的100-250(基于等级)(+100%AP)(+10%额外生命值)护盾值。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Empyrean Promise Vigilance active. Additionally, gain 15% heal and shield power. Active - Vigilance: After a 0.25-second delay, dash to the current location of the target allied champion and gain a 100 to 250 (+ 100% AP) (+ 10% bonus health) shield for 3 seconds. Upon arrival, grant the ally the same shield (20 second cooldown; 2000 range).

name: 舞会女王
effect: 每35秒，自动施放一道闪亮宝冠降临在你头上。当它着陆时，获得洛的终极技能，魅惑你碰到的敌人们。
effect_en: Every 35 seconds, Autocast a sparkly tiara descends upon you. When it lands, gain Rakan's Ultimate, charming enemies you touch.

name: 艾卡西亚的陷落
effect: 即刻：获得1个【斑比的熔渣】。任务：持有日炎圣盾和璀璨回响。奖励：将这些装备合成为虚空献祭。
effect_en: Immediately: Gain a Bami's Cinder. QUEST: Possess Sunfire Aegis and Hollow Radiance. REWARD: These Items combine into Void Immolation.
removed_reason: 不在 arammayhem.com 26.12 版本列表中

name: 蛋白粉奶昔
effect: 获得25%(+35%每100额外护甲)(+35%每100额外魔抗)治疗和护盾强度。
effect_en: Gain 25% (+ 35% per 100 bonus armor) (+ 35% per 100 bonus magic resistance) heal and shield power.

name: 质变：混沌
effect: 获得2个随机强化符文。
effect_en: Gain 2 random Augments.

name: 超负荷
effect: 使用另一个技能会重置【所选技能】技能的冷却时间。
effect_en: Using another Ability resets the cooldown of your chosen ability.

name: 踢踏舞
effect: 对敌方英雄和小兵的攻击特效获得10移动速度，持续5秒可无限叠加。此外，基于你的移动速度获得额外攻击速度。
effect_en: Basic attacks against champions and minions grant 10 bonus movement speed, lasting 5 seconds, stacking infinitely. Gain bonus attack speed based on your movement speed.

name: 软弹啪叽抓
effect: 偶尔对所有附近的敌方英雄放出软弹啪叽的手，然后用灵链系住。你的下次攻击将拉拽所有被系住的敌人。
effect_en: Occasionally send out squishy, slappy hands towards all nearby enemy champions, tethering them. Your next attack will pull in all tethered enemies.

name: 连拨击锤
effect: 对敌方英雄的攻击会发射5个额外飞弹，造成随距离提升的额外伤害。每个方向的冷却时间独立计算。
effect_en: Attacks against enemy champions fire 5 missiles that deal more damage with distance. Each direction has its own Cooldown.

name: 连锁反应
effect: 如果一个被【所选技能】技能击退的目标命中了另一个英雄，则二者都会被击飞并受到伤害。在与地形产生碰撞时，该击飞时长会延长并且他们会受到额外伤害。
effect_en: If a target Knocked Back by your chosen ability hits another champion, they are Knocked Up and dealt damage. When colliding with terrain, the Knock Up duration is extended and they are dealt bonus damage.

name: 针插垫
effect: 在【所选技能】技能期间进行攻击会施加标记，其会在该持续时长结束时爆炸，从而造成伤害并提供移动速度。
effect_en: Attacks during your chosen ability apply Marks that explode at the end of its duration, dealing damage and granting Move Speed.

name: 风语者的祝福
effect: 你的治疗效果和护盾效果还会提升目标的护甲和魔法抗性，这些加成持续3秒。
effect_en: Your Healing and Shielding also increases the target's Armor and Magic Resist for 3 seconds.

name: 飞升仪式
effect: 参与击杀敌方英雄后会留下其精华。攻击该精华会提供移动速度并重置基础技能冷却时间。
effect_en: On takedown, enemy champions leave behind their Essence. Attacking the Essence grants movement speed and resets basic ability cooldowns.

name: 飞身踢
effect: 你的攻击和技能处决生命值低于5%(+3%每100AD)(+0.2%每1000最大生命值)的敌方英雄，将其击飞并引发爆炸，同时治疗你自身。
effect_en: Your attacks and abilities execute enemy champions below 5% (+3% per 100 AD) (+0.2% per 1000 max health) of their max health, knocking back and causing an explosion while healing you.

name: 魄罗蛮冲
effect: 任务：收集【魄罗佳肴】并投喂5只魄罗。奖励：获得【魄罗冲锋】召唤师技能，可让魄罗们对敌方队伍发动几波攻势。每任务等级都会解锁额外的波次。
effect_en: QUEST: Gather Poro Snax and feed the required number of Poros.REWARD: Gain the Poro Charge Summoner Spell, which launches waves of Poros at the enemy team. Additional waves unlock per Quest Level.\"Oho! Look how charming they are!\" — Poro Herder

name: 不动如山
effect: 获余震和冰川增幅基石符文。
effect_en: Gain the Aftershock and Glacial Augment Keystone Runes.

name: 仁慈打击
effect: 在使用【所选技能】技能之后，你的下一次普攻获得50攻击距离、50%攻击速度并造成额外10%最大生命值魔法伤害。
effect_en: After using your chosen ability, your next basic attack gains attack range, attack speed and deals bonus max Health magic damage.

name: 仆从大师
effect: 你的召唤物获得40%体型提升、生命值和伤害。
effect_en: Your summons gain 40% increased size, health, and damage.

name: 任务：钢化你心
effect: 任务：持有【心之钢】且层数在300层或以上。奖励：将你的【心之钢】层数乘以3。
effect_en: QUEST: Possess Heartsteel with 300+ stacks. REWARD: Multiply your Heartsteel stacks by 3.

name: 全心为你
effect: 你对友军的治疗和护盾效果提升30%。
effect_en: Your heals and shields on allied champions are increased in effectiveness by 30%.
notes: Tier 已从 silver 修正为 gold（来源: LoL Wiki Module）

tests.t: 莫甘娜黑盾增幅后几乎无法被控制

name: 冰雪爆裂
effect: 再次施放雪球会造成提升伤害、击飞该目标、并击退附近的敌人们。
effect_en: Recasting Snowball deals increased damage, Knocks Up the target, and Knocks Back nearby enemies.

name: 升级：无尽之刃
effect: 获得25% 暴击几率和500金币。装备无尽之刃后，可使你的暴击几率在每次攻击都会提供随机的暴击伤害。
effect_en: Upgrades Infinity Edge, empowering it to gain Sword of the Divine Excoriate. Additionally, gain 500 gold and 25% critical strike chance. Excoriate: Gain a random amount of bonus critical strike damage that scales up to 50% of your critical strike chance, with the value of this amount changing every 0.25 seconds.

name: 升级：耀光
effect: 你的咒刃效果造成额外伤害并治疗你自身，治疗量相当于目标生命值的一定百分比。此外，获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades all Spellblade items, empowering the passive effect to deal additional bonus physical damage equal to 4% of the target's maximum health and heal you for 3.5% of your maximum health. Additionally, gain 250 gold.

name: 吞噬灵魂
effect: 定身一个敌方英雄时会提供20最大生命值。
effect_en: Immobilizing an enemy champion grants 20 max Health.

name: 咏叹奏鸣
effect: 每10秒，以一个不断交替的旋律来自动施放坚毅咏叹调和迅捷奏鸣曲。坚毅咏叹调治疗附近友军并提供一个临时的护盾光环。迅捷奏鸣曲提供一个临时光环来提供额外移动速度。
effect_en: Every 10 seconds, automatically cast the Aria of Perseverence and Song of Celerity in an alternating melody. Aria of Perseverence heals nearby allies and grants a temporary shielding aura. Song of Celerity grants a temporary aura that provides bonus Movement Speed.

name: 哎哟，我的硬币！
effect: 在参与击杀敌方英雄后，该英雄会在附近掉落多枚硬币，你和友军可以收集它们。每枚硬币价值10金币。
effect_en: On takedown, enemy champions drop coins nearby, which you and your allies can collect. Each is worth 10 gold.

name: 喂呜喂呜
effect: 在朝着低生命值的友军移动时，获得移动速度。你的治疗和护盾获得提升，基于你目标的低生命值程度。
effect_en: When moving towards allies with low Health, gain Movement Speed. Your Healing and Shielding are greater based on how low your target's Health is.

name: 回力OK镖
effect: 每10秒朝着一个附近的敌人自动施放投掷一个回力镖，对命中的敌人们造成40-200(基于等级)(+22%额外AD)(+15%AP)自适应伤害。
effect_en: Automatically cast Boomerang Blade at the closest nearby enemy champion within 1250 units, dealing 40 to 200 (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) adaptive damage to enemies hit (10 second cooldown).

name: 地形专家
effect: 你的【所选技能】技能会在它周围的一个区域内造成伤害。
effect_en: Your chosen ability deals damage in an area around it.

name: 坦克引擎
effect: 参与击杀敌方英雄时获得1层，可无限叠加。每层提升5%最大生命值和体型。阵亡时损失65%层数。
effect_en: Scoring a champion takedown generates a stack, stacking infinitely. For each stack, increase your maximum health and size by 5%. Lose 65% of stacks on death.

name: 夜狩
effect: 在对敌人造成伤害的3秒内参与击杀该敌人会使你进入隐身状态。
effect_en: Takedowns against enemy champions within 3 seconds of damaging them renders you invisible.

name: 威能之追求
effect: 任务：用【所选技能】技能命中敌人10次。奖励：永久提升【所选技能】技能伤害。
effect_en: QUEST: Hit enemy champions with your chosen ability the required number of times.REWARD: Permanently increase your chosen ability damage.

name: 小小的额外帮助
effect: 在你的【所选技能】技能持续期间获得50攻击距离和30%攻击速度。
effect_en: Gain the required number of Attack Range and the required number of Attack Speed during your chosen ability duration.

name: 尖端发明家
effect: 获得100装备急速(相当于50%装备冷却缩减)。装备急速可缩减所有装备技能的冷却时间。
effect_en: Gain 100 Item Haste (equivalent to 50% Item CDR). Item Haste reduces the cooldown  of all Item Abilities.

name: 属性叠属性！
effect: 获得3个【属性锻造器】，有更高几率出现黄金阶和棱彩阶锻造器！
effect_en: Gain 3 Stat Anvils, with a higher chance of Gold and Prismatic Anvils!

name: 弹球
effect: 你的标记变为弹球，造成100-500额外真实伤害，碰到地形会弹射。每次弹射增加飞行距离和伤害。
effect_en: Your Mark is empowered to throw a pinball, dealing 100 to 500 bonus true damage and ricocheting off terrain. Each ricochet increases travel distance and damage.

name: 循环往复
effect: 获得60技能急速。
effect_en: Gain 60 Ability Haste.

name: 心灵净化
effect: 参与击杀时，产生一次爆炸，对附近其它敌人们造成60%减速，并且造成基于他们当前生命值的伤害。
effect_en: On takedown, creates an explosion that slows other nearby enemies by 60%, and deals damage based on their current Health.

name: 急急小子
effect: 获得移动速度，相当于你的70%技能急速。
effect_en: Gain Move Speed equal to 70% of your Ability Haste.

name: 急速之追求
effect: 任务：用【所选技能】技能命中敌方英雄8次。奖励：【所选技能】技能获得技能急速，基于任务等级，至多至80。
effect_en: QUEST: Hit enemy champions with your chosen ability the required number of times.REWARD: Gain Ability Haste on your chosen ability per Quest Level up to the required number of.

name: 惊惧
effect: 每当你施放【所选技能】技能时，恐惧你周围的敌人们.
effect_en: Whenever you cast your chosen ability, Fear enemies around you.

name: 我们的治疗
effect: 每当你周围的某人进行治疗时，你获得相当于其15%治疗效果的治疗效果。从敌方治疗中获得双倍。
effect_en: Whenever someone heals around you, you heal 15% of their own healing. Doubled from Enemy healing.

name: 捐赠
effect: 获得1750金币。无需多问。
effect_en: Gain 1750 gold upon acquiring this augment.

name: 无尽大杀四方
effect: 在战斗状态下，自动施放一次环形斧头挥舞从而造成物理伤害。被斧刃命中的敌人们受到额外伤害并治疗你。
effect_en: While in combat, Autocast a circular axe that deals physical damage. Enemies on the outer edge take additional damage and heal you.

name: 星界躯体
effect: 获得1500生命值，但你造成的伤害降低10%。
effect_en: Gain 1500 Health, but you deal 10% less damage.

name: 更万用的瞄准镜
effect: 获得200攻击距离，如果你是远程英雄则降低至100攻击距离。
effect_en: Gain 200/100 bonus attack range.

name: 有始有终
effect: 获得先攻和黑暗收割基石符文。
effect_en: Gain the First Strike and Dark Harvest Keystone Runes.

name: 术士果汁盒
effect: 获得15%全能吸血。
effect_en: Gain the required number of Omnivamp.

name: 杀戮时间到了
effect: 施放终极技能时对所有敌方英雄施加死亡印记(8秒冷却)。印记储存你对其造成伤害的40%，在标记结束后引爆。
effect_en: Upon casting your ultimate ability, apply Death Mark to all enemy champions (8 second cooldown). The mark stores 40% of all post-mitigation damage you deal, detonating after the mark ends.

name: 活力焕发
effect: 使用召唤师技能时回复15%最大生命值。
effect_en: Using a Summoner Spell restores Health.

name: 溢流
effect: 你的技能法力消耗翻倍，但获得10%(+0.5%每100最大法力值)额外伤害以及自我和输出治疗/护盾提升。
effect_en: Your abilities' mana costs are doubled, but you gain 10% (+0.5% per 100 max mana) increased damage, healing, and shielding.

name: 火上浇油
effect: 攻击施加持续5秒的灼烧，每秒造成目标最大生命值0.4%的额外魔法伤害。灼烧可无限叠加，每次施加刷新持续时间。
effect_en: Basic attacks apply a Burn for 5 seconds dealing bonus magic damage equal to 0.4% of target's max health per second. Stacks infinitely, refreshes on reapplication.

name: 炽烈黎明
effect: 获得阳光效果：你的伤害技能会标记敌人，使其受到友军下一次攻击或技能命中时40-200额外魔法伤害(每个目标0.75秒冷却)。
effect_en: Gain Sunlight: Your damaging abilities mark enemies, causing them to take 40 to 200 bonus magic damage from ally's next attack or ability (0.75s cooldown per target).

name: 燃烧利息
effect: 施加至英雄的灼烧和持续伤害每秒生成3金币。
effect_en: Burns and damage over time applied to champions generates gold.

name: 牙仙子
effect: 爆裂敌人会掉落牙齿。拾取牙齿提供2穿甲和2法术穿透(永久叠加)。
effect_en: Bursting enemies drops Teeth. Picking up Teeth grants you permanent Lethality and Magic Penetration.

name: 狂徒豪气
effect: 在使用一次冲刺、闪烁或传送之后，你获得12护甲和魔法抗性，这个效果至多可叠加至5层。
effect_en: After using a Dash, Blink, or Teleport Ability you gain 12 Armor and Magic Resist up to 5 stacks.

name: 狙神飞星
effect: 任务：用技能狙击5个敌方英雄。奖励：一颗流星会飞向被狙击的敌方英雄，在其周围的一个区域内造成魔法伤害。
effect_en: QUEST: Snipe the required number of enemy champions with abilitiesREWARD: Send a meteor at Sniped enemy champions, dealing Magic damage in an area around them

name: 生机迸发
effect: 获得生机迸发作为一个召唤师技能。生机迸发会猛然提升你20%体型，击飞附近敌人并提供25%最大生命值。
effect_en: Gain Growth Spurt as a Summoner Spell. Growth Spurt suddenly increases your size, Knocking Up nearby enemies and granting max Health.

name: 神圣干预
effect: 战斗开始后的短时间内，召唤一颗护体星星。在它着陆时，你和附近的友军们进入持续2.5秒的免疫伤害状态。随后每35秒自动施放这个效果。
effect_en: Shortly after combat starts, call a protective star. Upon its landing, you and nearby allies become Invulnerable for a few seconds. Then Autocast this every 35 seconds.

name: 神射法师
effect: 你的攻击造成相当于你75%法术强度的额外物理伤害。
effect_en: Your Attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 75% Ability Power.

name: 穿针引线
effect: 获得18%护甲穿透和法术穿透。
effect_en: Gain 18%  Armor Penetration and  Magic Penetration.

name: 缩小射线
effect: 你的攻击会将目标的伤害与体型削减15%攻击特效。
effect_en: Your Attacks reduce the target's damage and size by 15%  On-Hit.

name: 缩小引擎
effect: 参与击杀后会让你变小并且获得技能急速和移动速度。阵亡时损失65%层数。
effect_en: Takedowns makes you smaller and grant Ability Haste and Movement Speed.

name: 罪恶快感
effect: 参与击杀后，在4秒内提升移动速度和攻击速度。
effect_en: Increase Movement Speed and Attack Speed for 4 seconds on takedown.

name: 老练狙神
effect: 用一个非终极技能狙击一个敌人时，返还该技能80%冷却时间(周期性技能返还65%)。
effect_en: Snipe an enemy with a non-Ultimate Ability refunds 80% Cooldown (65% for periodic Abilities).

name: 自然即是治愈
effect: 站在草丛中时，每秒回复2%最大生命值。
effect_en: Standing in Brush regenerates 2% max Health per second.

name: 藏身草丛
effect: 在进入草丛后，多造成20%伤害，持续2秒。留在草丛中会刷新这个效果。
effect_en: After entering Brush, deal 20% more damage for 2 seconds. Remain in the Brush to refresh the effect.

name: 虚幻武器
effect: 你的技能可施加攻击特效。每个目标有1秒冷却时间。
effect_en: Your Abilities apply  On-Hit effects. 1 second Cooldown per target.

name: 虚空冲刺
effect: 用【所选技能】技能冲刺时会产生一片虚空地带，减速敌人30%并造成40-120(+20%AP)魔法伤害。
effect_en: Dashing with your chosen ability spawns a Void Zone that Slows enemy champions and deals magic damage.

name: 虹吸
effect: 你的暴击会治疗你，治疗量相当于所造成伤害的12%。此外，获得25%暴击几率。
effect_en: Your critical strikes heal you for 12% of damage dealt. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

name: 裁决使
effect: 对生命值低于30%的敌人们多造成10%伤害。在参与击杀后重置你的基础技能。
effect_en: Deal 10% increased damage to enemies below 30% of their maximum health. Scoring a champion takedown resets the cooldown of all your basic abilities.

name: 豪猪
effect: 承受英雄伤害积攒尖针，释放时对附近敌人造成30-100伤害并减速25%，持续1.5秒。
effect_en: Taking damage from champions builds up a burst of needles that fly out of you, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies.

name: 质变：棱彩阶
effect: 获得1个随机棱彩阶强化符文。
effect_en: Gain a random  Prismatic Augment.

name: 贪欲束缚
effect: 用【所选技能】技能定身或缚地敌方英雄时造成40-120(+15%AP)额外伤害并治疗你自身。
effect_en: Immobilizing or Grounding enemy champions with your chosen ability deals extra damage and heals you.

name: 超凡邪恶
effect: 在你用技能对敌人造成伤害时永久获得1法术强度。如果是作为你的第二个强化符文，则自带40法术强度。
effect_en: Permanently gain 1 Ability Power when you damage enemy champions with Abilities. If taken as your second Augment, starts with 40 Ability Power.

name: 超强大脑
effect: 每拥有1法术强度就会获得3护盾值。阵亡时或耗尽后70秒重置。
effect_en: Gain 3 Shield for every  1 Ability Power. Resets on death or 70 seconds after depletion.
notes: Tier 已从 prismatic 修正为 gold（来源: LoL Wiki Module）。注：Wiki 中 Big Brain 为 Gold 级别

name: 轻拍背部
effect: 友军走过时为你提供60-180护盾和25%移动速度(持续2秒)。
effect_en: Allies encourage you when you walk past, granting you a Shield and Movement Speed.

name: 过量延伸者
effect: 回城进入加农炮发射器。射程、飞行速度和伤害提升150%。
effect_en: Recall to enter your Cannon Launcher. It has significantly increased range, travel speed, and damage.

name: 邦！
effect: 被【所选技能】技能强化的攻击或技能对目标和附近敌人造成20-60(+20%额外AD)(+10%AP)额外魔法伤害。
effect_en: Attacks and Abilities empowered by your chosen ability deal additional damage to the target and nearby enemies.

name: 闪现向前
effect: 你的闪现有3层充能。在120秒后，再次获得所有充能。
effect_en: Your Flash has 3 charges. After 120 seconds, regain all charges.
removed_reason: 不在 arammayhem.com 26.12 版本列表中

name: 面包和奶酪
effect: 你的【所选技能】技能获得100技能急速。
effect_en: Your champion's third basic ability (E) gains 100 ability haste.

name: 面包和果酱
effect: 你的【所选技能】技能获得100技能急速。
effect_en: Your champion's second basic ability (W) gains 100 ability haste.

name: 面包和黄油
effect: 你的【所选技能】技能获得100技能急速。
effect_en: Your champion's first basic ability (Q) gains 100 ability haste.

name: 高压锅
effect: 每秒对附近敌方英雄施加灼烧(基于最大生命值)。任务：对英雄造成灼烧伤害。奖励：提升高压锅的规模和伤害。
effect_en: Every second, apply a stacking Burn to nearby enemy champions, scaling with your max Health. QUEST: Deal Burn damage to enemy Champions. REWARD: Size and damage increase per Quest Level.

name: 魔法飞弹
effect: 造成技能伤害会对其发射3个飞弹，每个造成基于飞行距离的百分比最大生命值的真实伤害。
effect_en: Dealing Ability damage fires 3 missiles, each dealing percent max Health true damage based on distance traveled.

name: 鲨鱼暴风
effect: 鲨鱼环绕雪球，对附近敌人每秒造成20-80魔法伤害并减速30%。雪球命中英雄时触发鲨鱼风暴。
effect_en: Sharks circle your Snowball, slowing and damaging nearby enemies. When your Snowball hits a Champion, they become trapped in a shark storm!

name: 鲨鱼诱饵
effect: 阵亡3秒后，一头鲨鱼啃噬附近所有敌人，造成200-600(+30%AP)魔法伤害。你可以在阵亡后移动来瞄准。
effect_en: A few seconds after death, a shark chomps all nearby enemies. You can move after death to aim the shark attack.

name: 黎明使者的坚决
effect: 在跌到50%生命值以下时，在3秒里持续回复共30%最大生命值。阵亡时或每45秒重置。
effect_en: When dropping below 50% Health, heal for 30% max Health over 3 seconds.

name: 万用瞄准镜
effect: 获得100攻击距离，如果你是远程英雄则降低至50攻击距离。
effect_en: Gain 75/50 bonus attack range.

name: 下雪天
effect: 你的【雪球】获得100技能急速。在命中一名敌人时造成额外魔法伤害。如果你没有【雪球】，则获得一个【雪球】。
effect_en: Gain 100 Ability Haste on your Snowball. It deals additional magic damage when hitting an enemy. If you don't have one, gain a Snowball.

name: 主玩辅助
effect: 任务：治疗友方英雄2500生命值。奖励：你提供的任何治疗效果现在还会在初始治疗之后提供持续治疗。
effect_en: QUEST: Heal allied champions for the required number of Health. REWARD: Any healing you provide now also Heals Over Time after the initial heal.

name: 侵蚀
effect: 每次对敌人造成伤害时，降低其护甲和魔抗1.5%，持续4秒，最多叠加20层，总计降低30%双抗。
effect_en: Each instance of damage dealt to an enemy reduces their armor and magic resistance by 1.5% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20 times for a total of 30% resistances reduction.

name: 保持坚定
effect: 当【所选技能】技能对敌方英雄造成伤害时，获得10护甲和魔法抗性。可叠加至5层。
effect_en: When your chosen ability damages enemy champions, gain 10 Armor and Magic Resistance.

name: 俯冲轰炸
effect: 阵亡时爆炸，对500范围内的敌人造成相当于目标最大生命值20%的真实伤害。
effect_en: Upon death, explode to deal true damage equal to 20% of target's max health to enemies within 500 units.

name: 冰寒
effect: 你的减速效果可使移动速度降低额外的75。
effect_en: Your Slowing effects reduce Movement Speed by an extra 75.

name: 别停止引导
effect: 你每引导一秒获得30-90护盾值(基于等级)，最高叠加至900。
effect_en: Gain a Shield for every second you spend Channeling.

name: 前进时间到
effect: 激活【所选技能】技能期间获得30%移动速度。
effect_en: Activating your chosen ability grants you Movement Speed for its duration.

name: 升级：中娅
effect: 【中娅沙漏】的冷却时间降低至45秒。你现在可以在【中娅沙漏】、【探索者的护臂】或【沃格勒特的巫师帽】凝滞状态持续期间移动并获得移动速度。获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades Seeker's Armguard, Wooglet's Witchcap, and Zhonya's Hourglass, empowering Stasis to allow you to move during its active effect, during which time you also gain 50% bonus movement speed. Additionally, the cooldown of Zhonya's Hourglass Stasis is reduced to 45 seconds.

name: 升级：收集者
effect: 使用【收集者】的被动处决敌人时的处决阈值提升，并且提供额外金币。获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades The Collector, empowering Death to have its execution threshold increased by 0.5% each time you kill an enemy champion, capped at a threshold of 12.5% of the target's maximum health, and Taxes to generate a further 25 gold (total 50 gold) from kills. Additionally, gain 250 gold.

name: 升级：献祭
effect: 【璀璨回响】和【日炎圣盾】每当有目标受到【献祭】效果影响时，提供12 金币 。获得250金币。
effect_en: Upgrades Bami's Cinder, Hollow Radiance, Sunfire Aegis, and Void Immolation, empowering Immolate to additionally grant you 12 gold per tick for each enemy champion afflicted by its effect. Additionally, gain 250 gold.

name: 双生火焰
effect: 造成技能伤害时，发射1-4个飞弹(基于暴击率)，每个飞弹造成10-30(基于等级)(+7%额外AD)(+7%AP)魔法伤害。此外，获得15%暴击几率。
effect_en: Damaging abilities launch 1 (+ 1 per 33.33% critical strike chance) firecracker missiles at the target that each deal 10 to 30 (+ 7% bonus AD) (+ 7% AP) magic damage (5 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 15% critical strike chance.

name: 叠角龙
effect: 在你获得一个技能、强化符文或装备的永久层数时，多获得100%！
effect_en: When you gain permanent Stacks of an Ability, Augment, or Item gain 100% more!

name: 可靠武器
effect: 用【所选技能】技能打击敌方英雄时铸造友谊纽带。每层友谊提供5-15额外伤害。
effect_en: Striking enemy champions with your chosen ability forges a bond of Friendship. Each stack of Friendship grants 5-15 bonus damage based on your level.

name: 台风
effect: 攻击会向一个额外目标发射一枚飞弹，造成30%AD的物理伤害并施加攻击特效。
effect_en: Basic attacks fire a bolt at an additional target dealing 30% AD physical damage and applying on-hit effects.

name: 吵闹鬼
effect: 获得【吵闹鬼】作为一个召唤师技能。吵闹鬼会同时施放召唤师技能【屏障】和【幽灵疾步】。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Poltergeist. Poltergeist: geteffect Poltergeist

name: 唯快不破
effect: 每比目标多10点移动速度，造成的伤害提升1%。
effect_en: Deal 1% increased damage per 10 movement speed you have more than the target.

name: 坚若磐石
effect: 每当定身或缚地一个敌人时，获得10护甲和10魔抗，持续4秒，最高叠加5层。
effect_en: Each time you Immobilize or Ground an enemy, gain Armor and Magic Resist.

name: 大力
effect: 获得20%攻击力。
effect_en: Gain  20% Attack Damage.

name: 大师铸就
effect: 使你的装备和强化符文伤害提升12%。
effect_en: Increase your Item and Augment damage by 12%.

name: 天音爆
effect: 为友军提供增益、治疗或护盾时，对450范围内的敌人造成30-150真实伤害并减速30%，持续2秒(2秒冷却)。
effect_en: Granting a buff, heal, or shield to an ally deals 30 to 150 true damage to enemies within 450 units and slows by 30% for 2 seconds (2 second cooldown).

name: 家园卫士
effect: 获得100%移动速度，在受到伤害后失效6秒。
effect_en: Gain 100% Movement Speed, disabled for 6 seconds after taking damage.

name: 属性！
effect: 获得2个【属性锻造器】！
effect_en: Gain 2  Stat Anvils!

name: 山脉龙魂
effect: 获得山脉龙魂，脱离战斗2秒后获得相当于10%最大生命值的护盾。
effect_en: You gain the Mountain Soul, gaining a Shield after being out of combat for a short time.

name: 巫师式思考
effect: 获得20-80(基于等级)法术强度。
effect_en: Grants 20 to 80 ability power.

name: 强力护盾
effect: 当你获得护盾时，获得40-100(基于等级)适应之力，持续3秒。(5秒冷却时间)
effect_en: Gain 40 to 100 adaptive force for 3 seconds upon gaining a shield (5 second cooldown).

name: 快中求稳
effect: 冲刺或闪烁后获得一个持续2秒的护盾，吸收65-290(+65%AD)(+26%AP)伤害(5秒冷却)。
effect_en: After dashing or blinking, gain a shield lasting 2 seconds that absorbs 65 to 290 (+65% AD) (+26% AP) damage (5 second cooldown).

name: 急救用具
effect: 获得20%治疗和护盾强度。
effect_en: Gain 20% Heal and Shield Power.

name: 恶趣味
effect: 定身或缚地敌方英雄时对你进行治疗。
effect_en: Immobilize or ground an enemy champion heal you for 30 to 250 (+ (5 second cooldown per cast instance).

name: 扇巴掌
effect: 每当你定身或缚地一个敌人时，获得10适应之力。阵亡时损失50%。
effect_en: Gain 10 Adaptive Force when you Immobilize or Ground an enemy. Lose 50% on death.

name: 旋转至胜
effect: 你的旋转类技能获得30技能急速并且多造成30%伤害。
effect_en: Your spin Abilities gain 30 Ability Haste and deal 30% more damage.

name: 暗影疾奔
effect: 冲刺、闪烁或退出隐身状态后，获得300移动速度，持续2秒。
effect_en: After dashing, blinking, or exiting stealth, gain 300 bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

name: 杀意翻涌
effect: 对生命值低于40%最大生命值的敌方英雄，获得60%额外移动速度。
effect_en: Gain 60% bonus movement speed towards enemy champions below 40% of their max health.

name: 注魔
effect: 攻击特效消耗2.5%最大法力值，造成相当于3.5%最大法力值的魔法伤害，该伤害可以暴击。
effect_en: Basic attacks on-hit consume 2.5% of your maximum mana to deal bonus magic damage equal to 3.5% of your maximum mana. This damage can critically strike for 100 bonus damage.

name: 海克斯科技龙魂
effect: 获得海克斯科技龙魂，每3秒下一次伤害型技能或攻击触发闪电爆裂，对敌人造成80-120魔法伤害并减速40%。
effect_en: Periodically your next damaging Ability or Attack triggers a lightning blast, chaining through enemies to deal damage and Slow.

name: 海洋龙魂
effect: 获得海洋龙魂(基础治疗值100)，如果你已有海洋龙魂则获得其他龙魂。
effect_en: Grants the Ocean Dragon Soul with a modified base heal value of 100, or a different Dragon Soul if you already have it.

name: 渴血
effect: 获得15%全能吸血。
effect_en: Gain 15% Omnivamp.

name: 火狐
effect: 自动施放获得移动速度并召唤3道烈焰环绕于你，瞄准距离内相距最近的那个可见英雄并造成魔法伤害。
effect_en: Autocast Gain Movement Speed and conjure three flames that orbit you, targetting the closest visible enemy in range and dealing magic damage.

name: 灵巧
effect: 获得 60%攻击速度。
effect_en: Gain  60% Attack Speed.

name: 点亮他们！
effect: 每第4次攻击发射4个飞弹以造成魔法伤害攻击特效。
effect_en: Every 4th Attack shoots 4 missiles dealing magic damage  On-Hit.

name: 炼狱龙魂
effect: 获得炼狱龙魂，使用技能或攻击命中敌人时造成30-60(+10%AD)(+5%AP)额外魔法伤害。
effect_en: You gain the Infernal Dragon Soul, dealing bonus damage when you hit enemies with Abilities or Attacks.

name: 狂热者
effect: 获得25%暴击几率(+5%每100AP)和35%攻击速度(+5%每100AP)。
effect_en: Gain 35% (+ 5% per 100 AP) bonus attack speed and 25% (+ 5% per 100 AP) critical strike chance.

name: 由心及物
effect: 获得相当于最大法力值50%的额外生命值。
effect_en: Grants bonus health equal to 50% maximum mana.

name: 纯粹主义者 - 术师
effect: 将所有额外攻击速度按0.65技能急速/1%攻速的比例转化为技能急速。此外，你的技能总冷却时间缩减10%。
effect_en: Convert all bonus attack speed into ability haste at 0.65 haste per 1% AS. Additionally, abilities' total cooldowns reduced by 10%.

name: 练腿日
effect: 获得50移动速度和40%减速抗性。
effect_en: Gain 50 Movement Speed and 40% Slow Resist.

name: 终极不可阻挡
effect: 在你使用你的终极技能后，你获得持续3秒的控制免疫。 (8秒冷却时间)。
effect_en: After using your Ultimate, you become immune to crowd control for 3 seconds. (8 second Cooldown).

name: 自适应防护
effect: 用【所选技能】技能打击一个敌方英雄时，为你提供持续6秒的8护甲或魔法抗性，基于该技能的伤害类型。可叠加至5层。
effect_en: Striking an enemy champion with your chosen ability grants you 8 Armor or Magic Resist based on their damage type for 6 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

name: 质变：黄金阶
effect: 获得1个随机黄金阶强化符文。
effect_en: Gain a random  Gold Augment.
removed_reason: 不在 arammayhem.com 26.12 版本列表中

name: 转得我眩晕了
effect: 替换一个召唤师技能为骄行荡寇。可激活3次后进入冷却，第3次需在0.5秒后才能使用。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Heroic Swing. Can activate 3 times before cooldown; third cast requires 0.5s delay.

name: 适应
effect: 将额外攻击力转化为法术强度。获得15%法术强度。
effect_en: Convert Bonus Attack Damage to Ability Power. Gain 15% Ability Power.

name: 逃跑计划
effect: 在降至35%生命值时，获得巨量持续衰减的护盾、持续衰减的移动速度和持续衰减的缩小效果。
effect_en: Gain a massive decaying Shield, decaying Movement Speed, and a decaying shrink effect upon reaching 35% Health.

name: 重量级打击手
effect: 你的攻击造成相当于你3.5%最大生命值的额外物理伤害。
effect_en: Your Attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 3.5% of your max Health.

name: 防护面纱
effect: 每30秒获得一层法术护盾来格挡下一个敌方技能。
effect_en: Gain a Spell Shield every 30 seconds that blocks the next enemy Ability.
removed_reason: 不在 arammayhem.com 26.12 版本列表中

name: 魔法转物理
effect: 将法术强度转化为额外攻击力。获得15%攻击力。
effect_en: Convert Ability Power to Bonus Attack Damage. Gain 15% Attack Damage.

name: 加固护盾
effect: 来自【?】技能的护盾变得更强并且受益于目标的已损失生命值。
effect_en: Shields granted from your chosen ability are stronger and scaling with target's missing Health.
removed_reason: 不在 arammayhem.com 26.12 版本列表中

name: 大法师
effect: 施放一个技能返还另一个随机技能30%冷却时间的法力消耗。
effect_en: Casting a spell refunds another random spell's cost by the required number of% of the original spell's Cooldown.

name: 任务：艾卡西亚的陷落
effect: 即刻：获得一个斑比的熔渣并且你可以同时购买两件献祭装备。需求：持有日炎圣盾和璀璨回响。奖励：将它们合成为虚空献祭。
effect_en: Invincible. Charge in invuln.

name: 双重防御
effect: 来自【所选技能】技能的护盾提升25%，并且受益于目标已损失生命值额外获得最多50%护盾值。
effect_en: Shields granted from your chosen ability are stronger and scaling with target's missing Health.

name: 闪闪现现
effect: 替换一个召唤师技能为闪现。此外获得70召唤师技能急速。装备此强化时两个召唤师技能栏都是闪现，且共享冷却时间。
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Flash. Gain 70 summoner spell haste. Both summoner spell slots become Flash and share a cooldown.

name: 闪光弹
effect: 你在【闪现】时会在你周围引发爆炸，造成70 - 240 (基于等级) (+ 70% AD) (+ 60% AP) 魔法伤害和持续@SlowDuration@秒的@SlowAmount*100@%减速。每次阵亡时重置闪现。
effect_en: Using Flash creates an explosion around the blink location that deals 70 to 240 (+ 70% AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies and slows them by 35% for 1.25 seconds. Additionally, the cooldown of your Flash resets upon your death.

name: 你摸不到
effect: 施放终极技能使你免疫伤害2秒(8秒冷却)。
effect_en: Casting your ultimate grants you invulnerability for 2 seconds (8 second cooldown).

name: 作弊：我能回城！
effect_en: Your Recall is now functional and is upgraded to Empowered Recall. Additionally, you no longer lose the ability to purchase items from the shop after exiting the shop area, and the fountain will now provide healing and resource restoration for you.

name: 砸开那颗蛋
effect_en: Your shields detonate upon expiration, creating an explosion that deals magic damage equal to 100% of the shield's strength to nearby enemies.

name: 暴击飞弹
effect_en: Critical strikes launch 1 (+ 1 per 33.33% critical strike chance) firecracker missiles at the target that each deal 11 to 40 (+ 7% bonus AD) (+ 10% AP) magic damage (4 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

name: 暴击律动
effect_en: Your critical strikes grant you 6% bonus attack speed for 6 seconds, stacking up to 10 times for a total of 60%. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

name: 魔鬼之舞
effect_en: Gain the Fleet Footwork and Grasp of the Undying keystone runes.

name: 位面转移
effect: 获得【当黑暗降临】召唤师技能。创造一个区域，其中的友军获得隐身效果和移动速度。
effect_en: Gain the When the Darkness Comes Summoner Spell. Create a zone that transports everyone inside of it to another dimension.

name: 冰霜 幽灵
effect_en: Automatically cast Ring of Frost, creating a cold pulse around you in 450 radius that roots nearby enemies for 1.25 seconds (6.5 second cooldown).

name: 帽上加帽
effect_en: Gain 15 ability power and 8 bonus magic resistance for each headwear item or hat you have in your inventory, reduced to 8 ability power and 4 bonus magic resistance for hats obtained from Cappa Juice and Stat Bonus. Eligible Items: Abyssal Mask, Bloodletter's Curse, Cosmic Drive, Edge of Night, Experimental Hexplate, Fimbulwinter, Haunting Guise, Hollow Radiance, Hubris, Jak'Sho, The Protean, Knight's Vow, Liandry's Torment, Rabadon's Deathcap, Riftmaker, Shurelya's Battlesong, Spectre's Cowl, Wooglet's Witchcap

name: 圣火
effect_en: Your heals and shields cause you to fire a missile to the nearest enemy unit within 650 units over 0.32 seconds, applying a Burn upon arrival that deals magic damage equal to 0.2% of the target's maximum health every second over 5 seconds, for a total of 1% (1.5-second cooldown). The Burn's per-tick damage increases to up to 0.8% of the target's maximum health based on the relative value of the triggering heal or shield against the maximum health of the ally recipient, for a total maximum damage of 4% of the target's maximum health.

name: 小猫咪找妈妈
name_en: I'm a Baby Kitty Where is Mama

name: 关键暴击
effect_en: Grants 50% critical strike chance.

name: 基石法师
effect_en: Gain the Arcane Comet and Summon Aery keystone runes.

name: 激光治疗
effect_en: Replace a summoner spell with Laser Heal. Laser Heal:

name: 绝活玩家
effect: 在选择强化符文时，一栏将始终只包含与你之前选择的强化符文相同稀有度的强化符文。
effect_en: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, One Trick Pony is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.

name: 轨道镭射
effect_en: Replaces the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by Flash with Orbital Laser. Orbital Laser: Call upon an orbital laser to fire down on the target location after 2.5 seconds, immediately dealing true damage equal to the 25% of the target's maximum health then every 0.5 seconds over 3 seconds to enemies within a 550 radius, up to a total of magic damage. Deals 70% damage to Minions. This augment is only offered to up to 1 player on each team for a given game.

name: 魄罗爆破手
effect_en: You summon a Poro alongside yourself every 5 seconds, up to 4 at a time. Damaging an enemy champion with an ability commands all of your Poros to launch themselves at the target, each dealing true damage equal to 3% of the target's maximum health and knocking them back a short distance. This augment is only offered to up to 1 player on each team for a given game.

name: 退敌力场
effect_en: Upon dropping below 35% of your maximum health, you knock back all enemies within a 500 radius by 750 units and slow them by 90% for 1.5 seconds (25 second cooldown, resets upon death).

name: 速度恶魔
effect_en: Whenever you damage an enemy champion with an ability, gain 200 bonus movement speed decaying over 1 second.

name: 电涌力场
effect: 施放终极技能时，创造一个区域，为其中的友军提供技能急速和移动速度。
effect_en: On Ultimate cast, spawn a Zone that grants Ability Haste and Movement Speed. While inside, it fires missiles that deal the required number of% of your damage.

name: 残暴之力
effect_en: Grants 25 bonus attack damage, 10 ability haste, and 5 lethality.

name: 精准奇才
effect_en: Upon damaging an enemy while located at over 700 units away at the time of the hit, cast Trueshot Barrage in their direction. The barrage deals 100 to 350 (+ 80% bonus AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage to enemies it passes through (15 second cooldown). This augment is only offered to up to 1 player on each team for a given game.

name: 升级：弯刀
effect_en: Upgrades both Lifeline and Spectral Cutlass, reducing the cooldown of Soul Anchor to 30 seconds and empowering its active to grant you 25% increased damage while it is in effect. Additionally, gain 250 gold.

name: 刃下生风
effect_en: Gain 1.5 bonus movement speed per 1 Lethality or flat magic penetration, and 5 bonus movement speed per 10% armor penetration or magic penetration.
